items.title: This 25W Baseus MagSafe power bank is a staple in my Apple EDC, now nearly 50% off at $42 low
items.summary: Courtesy of Baseus’ official Amazon storefront, you can now get its PicoGo AM52 10,000mAh Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank for $42.99 shipped. Be sure to enter promo code UTYJDF7V at checkout to see the discounted price. This model regularly sells for $80, so today’s deal takes $37 off and delivers a 46% discount. That marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for this particular version, which pairs 25W Qi2.2 wireless charging with a built-in 45W USB-C cable. We have seen the variant of this power bank without the Type-C cable go for less in the past, but this is the best price we’ve seen on this more convenient model. Head below for more details.

items.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]

items.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
items.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The […]

Buy for $5 (Reg. $12)

Apply NLONU973 during checkout.

What we love

There are loads of more delicate straps and organization solutions for all of your indoor charging cables and EDC needs, but sometimes you need something more robust for extension cables and outdoor power cables, and even hoses.
